title: Wholesome Indian Andouille Tagine
description: A creamy herb laden tagine that blends Punjabi spices with smoky andouille sausage for a kid friendly feast.
instructions: Heat a clay pot over medium heat and add a splash of oil.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent.
Stir in the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for one minute.
Add the tomato paste, cumin and smoked paprika, stirring until fragrant.
Place the sliced andouille sausage into the pot and brown on all sides.
Pour in the coconut milk and add the halved apricots, stirring to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for 20 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Remove the lid, taste, and season with salt and black pepper to preference.
Stir in the chopped cilantro just before serving for freshness.
Serve hot directly from the clay pot with a side of basmati rice or naan.
